coreArchitecturalQuestion: A reusable Process A artifact must contain stable planning knowledge; must not contain user-specific generated dosage, week-specific session construction, values derivable deterministically from another canonical field, duplicate ordering already represented by collection order or slot index, or Process B output masquerading as reusable catalog knowledge.
keyAsymmetryFound: sequenceOrder is actively validated (shape-only) while components has zero validator coverage of any kind, despite both being schema-required fields on sibling artifact types.
searchScopeConfirmation: sequenceOrder, components, workout components, session components, component ordering, warmup, cooldown, repetitions, recovery, main set searched across plan-catalog/ in full; beyond model/schema/validator/test/audit locations, all remaining matches were catalog JSON data files and Golden Fixture v3 documents (data, not code-level consumers). No Process A CLI command reads/transforms either field beyond generic document operations.

crossWorkoutComparison.notes: generated model never decomposes this key into components; no marathon-specific or embedded-quality structure inferred
open question is granularity (generic MAIN_SET vs FARTLEK-specific label), not whether structure exists
no marathon-specific long-run structure inferred for this 10K pilot; LONG_RUN_PROGRESSION is a distinct non-substitutable key, not evidence for this key

crossWorkoutComparison.structuralPattern: composite, continuous-format only (2/2 fixture instances have components, zero repetitions field)
crossWorkoutComparison.notes: cruise-repeat/interval format realized as a separate workout key (TEN_K_REPETITIONS); distinction should likely live at WorkoutDefinition key level, not as a shape change to THRESHOLD_TEMPO; no concrete repetition count or duration assigned

structuralGroupingCorroboration: The continuous/composite split (EASY_STANDARD+LONG_RUN_STANDARD vs FARTLEK+THRESHOLD_TEMPO) is independently corroborated by the pre-existing CANONICAL_CONFIRMED AllowedDistanceAccountingModes field (EXACT_SESSION_TOTAL vs ESTIMATED_SESSION_TOTAL).

goldenFixtureBoundarySummary.genericComponentTypeValues: structural evidence, reusable catalog knowledge (WARM_UP, COOL_DOWN, STRIDES)
goldenFixtureBoundarySummary.workoutSpecificComponentTypeValues: derived fixture output, not promoted to catalog vocabulary (FARTLEK_MAIN_SET, TEMPO_MAIN_SET, INTERVAL_MAIN_SET)
goldenFixtureBoundarySummary.numericComponentFields: user-specific generated value, never copied into reusable definitions (repetitions, durationSeconds, distanceKm, pace bounds)
goldenFixtureBoundarySummary.componentsPresencePattern: structural evidence only -- tells whether a components concept applies, never what values it should contain

finalStatus: Schema-necessity usage trace and cross-workout comparison complete for all five blockers. No field classification changed; no schema, model, validator, or catalog file modified.
